title: Wild Rift Patch Notes 5.1d
paragraphs: Fiora BUFF: Health scaling 3.5%->4% max HP, improved bonus AD ratios on Duelist's Dance and Lunge, reduced mana costs on Bladework.
Graves BUFF: End of the Line cooldown 13/11/9/7->11.5/10/8.5/7s, monster damage 90%->105%, higher shell damage scaling.
Nasus BUFF: More mana regeneration, Siphoning Strike stacks 4->5 per kill, 8->10 per large kill.
Varus BUFF: Piercing Arrow damage ratios 115%->125% AD, 172.5%->187.5% maximum AD.
Warwick BUFF: Base armor increases, improved Jaws of the Beast scaling.
Brand NERF: Pillar of Flame base damage reduced, Conflagration AP ratio 50%->45%.
Jayce NERF: Shock Blast base damage lowered across all levels.
Kai'Sa NERF: Supercharge movement speed 60/65/70/75%->50/55/60/65%, attack speed bonus reduced, movement amplification lowered.
Maokai NERF: Base stats and all ability damages decreased, Twisted Advance cooldown increased.
Thresh NERF: Base attack damage 58->54, minion soul drop rates reduced.
Tryndamere NERF: Battle Fury attack speed and Bloodlust bonus AD scaling cut.
Twisted Fate NERF: Card AP ratios lowered, Stacked Deck damage and attack speed bonuses reduced.
Katarina ADJUST: Voracity base damage reduced, Shunpo damage and AP ratio increased.
Terminus NERF: Cost 3200->3400 gold, combine cost 300->500 gold.
